_comment: Additive deltas to the consumption JSON envelope (009 contract). schema_version stays 1 (FR-008). New fields when --budget is supplied: result.budget (omitempty), group.over_budget, top_burner.over_budget.

groups._comment_nil_aic: aic absent (all runs failed) -> never over budget (FR-009)

_no_budget_variant._comment: When --budget is NOT supplied: `budget` and `over_budget` are omitted, preserving byte-identical pre-feature JSON output. schema_version remains unchanged.
